summary: Comprehensive SelvaVibes CRM testing completed. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend partially functional with authentication issues.

integration_issues.issue: Demo credentials carlos.mendoza@selvavibes.mx / demo123 return 401 'Credenciales inválidas'

Frontend beautiful UI design with emerald theme
